$comment: Mock payload modelling what a Figma Dev Mode MCP -> agent -> DesignJS MCP relay produces. Each entry is the argument shape for an `add_components` tool call. Source frame is a fictional Figma file 'Marketing v3 / Pricing'; the agent has translated each top-level Auto Layout frame into HTML with Tailwind utilities and design-token references via var(...) for the brand color (matching the get_variable_defs output the relay flow recommends piping through set_variables).
